summary: Iteration 239: Complete testing of Trend Indicators and Sales Team Coaching System features. All 17 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified - Weekly Performance Report page loads correctly with all sections. Team Coaching Insights section in SalesManagerDashboard is implemented but only visible to sales_manager role users (not admin). Trend indicators in notifications working correctly with week-over-week comparison arrows (↑/↓).

tests: GET /api/admin/dashboard/team-kpis returns coaching_insights array with flagged reps
GET /api/admin/dashboard/team-kpis returns coaching_all array with all reps
Coaching insight structure includes id, name, score, status, reasons, actions, metrics
Coaching classification correct: ≥75=Top Performer, 50-74=Strong, 25-49=Improving, 10-24=Needs Attention, <10=Critical
Coaching insights have max 2 reasons and max 2 actions
Coaching metrics snapshot includes avg_rating, deals, critical_discounts
coaching_insights filtered to Critical/Needs Attention/Improving only
coaching_insights limited to max 7 reps
coaching_all sorted by score ascending (worst first)
GET /api/admin/reports/weekly-performance returns coaching_summary field
coaching_summary structure includes name, status, issue, action
coaching_summary only includes Critical and Needs Attention reps
POST /api/admin/settings-hub/report-schedule/deliver-now creates notification
Notification message contains trend indicators (↑/↓, +/-, %)
Notification includes week-over-week comparison for revenue, orders, rating, alerts
Weekly Performance Report page loads at /admin/reports/weekly-performance
Report title shows 'Weekly Business Performance' with date range
KPI row displays Revenue, Orders, Margin, Avg Rating, Discounts, Net Profit
Top Performers section displays correctly
Needs Attention section displays correctly
Risk & Alerts section displays with alert count
Financial Summary section displays
Customer Experience section displays
Product Intelligence section with Top Products and Dead Stock
Procurement Insights section with Restock and Review/Remove
Actions for This Week section displays
Team Coaching Summary conditionally renders when flagged reps exist
Admin Dashboard V2 loads for admin role users
Control Center header displays correctly
KPI row with Orders Today, Revenue, Pending Payments, etc.
Operations, Finance, Commercial, Partners & Team snapshots display
Charts: Orders Trend, Revenue Trend, Order Status Distribution

critical_code_review_comments: Note: SalesManagerDashboard with Team Coaching Insights section is only visible to users with role='sales_manager', not admin users. Admin users see AdminDashboardMain (Control Center). This is by design but differs from the main agent's note.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 239 verified: (1) Coaching engine backend fully functional - /api/admin/dashboard/team-kpis returns coaching_insights (flagged reps) and coaching_all (all reps) with correct structure and classification. (2) Weekly report at /api/admin/reports/weekly-performance returns coaching_summary for Critical/Needs Attention reps. (3) Trend indicators in notifications working - messages include ↑/↓ arrows and +/- percentages for week-over-week comparison. (4) Frontend Weekly Performance Report page displays all sections correctly. (5) Team Coaching Summary section conditionally renders only when flagged reps exist (currently empty as all reps are 'Improving' status). (6) SalesManagerDashboard with Team Coaching Insights is only visible to sales_manager role users, not admin users.

sample_insight.name: Brian Kweka
actions: Follow up on stale quotes and re-engage pipeline
Convert or close stale pipeline items

notification_trend_sample: Weekly Performance (03 Apr — 10 Apr 2026): Revenue TZS 229,805 (-72% ↓) | 5 orders (-17 ↓) | Rating 0/5 (+0) | 22 alerts (+22 ⚠)
